cases.prompt: Implement a new export workflow that adds an ExportCoordinator, CsvExportWriter, and ExportAuditStore. Keep the design small and make sure each class has one clear reason to change.
expected_decisions: Class/module layout is checked before implementation
New abstractions are justified or removed

cases.prompt: Before coding this normal-risk parser change, set a budget for new helpers/wrappers and audit whether any new abstraction is worth keeping after the tests pass.
expected_decisions: Helper/wrapper count is budgeted before implementation
Unjustified abstraction is deleted, inlined, or merged

cases.prompt: This UserService is gaining billing, notification, and audit responsibilities. Decide whether to split, merge, or rename units before implementation.
expected_decisions: Reasons to change are mapped per unit
Name and responsibility mismatches are renamed or explicitly kept

cases.prompt: Fix a typo in one README sentence. No behavior, public API, test, class, module, helper, or wrapper changes.
expected_decisions: Default implementation lane is skipped with a low-risk reason

cases.prompt: Rename one private helper and split one long function into two smaller functions without adding classes, modules, layers, or wrappers.
expected_decisions: Function-level shape is routed to function-boundary-governor rather than module responsibility layout

cases.prompt: Choose whether this workflow should use a queue, synchronous request path, or separate service based on latency, reliability, rollback, and operability tradeoffs.
expected_decisions: Cross-boundary option comparison stays in architecture-decision-analysis
